title: frankenia nothria
intro: Frankenia nothria, also known as the sea heath or saltbush, is a shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae. It is native to the coastal regions of Australia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from damage caused by UV radiation and other environmental stressors, providing health benefits such as wound healing and skin protection. Frankenia nothria can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems.
